column2: CAA Officer Raises Level-One Finding - Entity Approval Holder Does Not Receive
column3: ['The CAA officer finds non-compliance with requirements that do not lead to an effect on the safety of a UAS operation. ', 'The CAA officer raises a level-one finding to the entity approval holder. ']
column4: ['Non-compliance is identified by the CAA officer. ', 'A level-one finding is created and transmitted to the entity approval holder, but it does not reach them. ']
